---
title: "\'Doctrine and Practice\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Doctrine and Practice\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1895
**Genre:** Non-fiction, theology
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 5:19 (July 1895) 151-157

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
